title: Rough day
body: Fatigue was really bad today. Headache started around noon. Stayed in bed most of the afternoon.
Woke up feeling a bit better. Managed a short walk to the letterbox. Still tired by 3pm.

title: Crash day
body: Complete crash. Did not get out of bed. Everything hurts.

title: Better week
body: Feeling more like myself today. Cooked dinner for the first time in days.
